PETITIONER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL NON-PARTY'S COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS, CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2012 NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS DENIED WITH RESPECT TO TAX RETURNS. THE MOTION IS DENIED WITH RESPECT TO REQUESTS WHERE THE RESPONDING PARTY HAS ALREADY AGREED OR OFFERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS (BUT ON CONDITION THAT THOSE DOCUMENTS IN FACT BE PRODUCED) AND WITH RESPECT TO REQUESTS WHERE THE RESPONDING PARTY HAS STATED THAT THERE ARE NO RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS OR THAT ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS HAVE ALREADY BEEN PRODUCED. WITH RESPECT TO ALL OTHER REQUESTS, THE RESPONDING PARTY AND THE BANK MUST PRODUCE THOSE DOCUMENTS THAT MENTION OR REFER IN ANY WAY TO ROBERT MOE BUT NEED NOT PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THAT DO NOT MENTION OR REFER TO MR. MOE. THE COURT WILL NOT AWARD SANCTIONS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY RESPONDENT HOLSWORTH, SR., DONALD HOLSWORTH, JR., DONALD HOLSWORTH, LINDA
